name: mlforge-tools
description: Principal/staff-level ML engineering plugins — AWS (EKS/ECS), behavioral and NLP problems.

plugins.name: mlforge
plugins.description: End-to-end ML engineering sprint system: FRAME → PLAN → EXPERIMENT → EVALUATE → SHIP → MONITOR → LEARN. 19 skills + an agent connected by an artifact pipeline and gate ledger, with iron-law rigor and token-efficient output.
